/bin/mkdir -p /usr/ports/devel/qt4-moc/work/qt-everywhere-opensource-src-4.8.6/mkspecs
/bin/ln -sf /usr/local/bin/qmake-qt4 /usr/ports/devel/qt4-moc/work/qt-everywhere-opensource-src-4.8.6/bin/qmake
